summary: Phase 1 Dashboard V2 Endpoints + Insurance CRUD: All 31 backend tests passed (100%). Verified 5 new dashboard cards and Insurance CRUD endpoints. AI Insight uses LIVE GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped per request (React Native Expo app - cannot test via browser)

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 dashboard endpoints implemented correctly with proper authentication
8-dimension Financial Health Score returns composite_score (0-1000) with grade
Net Worth endpoint calculates assets vs liabilities correctly
Investment Summary endpoint includes XIRR calculation
Upcoming Dues sorted by days_until with proper urgency levels
AI Insight uses LIVE GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key (not mocked)
Insurance CRUD fully functional - Create, Read, Update, Delete all working
Proper auth required on all endpoints (401 returned for unauthenticated requests)

success_rate.frontend: Not tested (React Native app - browser testing N/A)

seed_data_creation: Insurance test policy created and deleted during testing (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Dashboard V2 fully tested. All 5 new dashboard cards working: Financial Health V2 (8 dimensions, 0-1000 score), Net Worth, Investment Summary (with XIRR), Upcoming Dues, AI Insight (GPT-4o live). Insurance CRUD working. Demo user has 2 seeded insurance policies.
